entity.summary: Hybrid crypto exchange combining a central limit order book and high-speed matching with non-custodial account architecture and DeFi liquidity integration.
entity.notes: The official About page describes Cube as a crypto exchange, labels the model CEX & DEX, and states Founded 2023. The launch date uses a year-level approximation. The official legal library footer identifies Cube Exchange Australia Pty Ltd.

evidence.title: About Cube Exchange
evidence.notes: First-party About page describes Cube as a crypto exchange, explicitly presents a CEX & DEX model, and states Founded 2023.

evidence.title: Cube Legal & Compliance
evidence.notes: First-party legal library remains live and identifies Cube Exchange Australia Pty Ltd in the site footer.

evidence.title: Cube exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: Discovery registry source identifies exchange id `cube`; a separate DefiLlama row is treated as the same entity rather than a second deployment-derived entity.
